description: General-purpose utility functions that can be used across various projects.

modules.name: string-utils
modules.description: A collection of helper functions for common string manipulations.

functions.name: capitalize
functions.description: Capitalizes the first letter of a given string.

functions.name: truncate
functions.description: Truncates a string to a specified length and appends '...'.

functions.name: camelCase
functions.description: Converts a kebab-case or snake_case string to camelCase.

functions.name: pascalCase
functions.description: Converts a string to PascalCase (or UpperCamelCase).

functions.name: snakeCase
functions.description: Converts a string to snake_case.

functions.name: kebabCase
functions.description: Converts a string to kebab-case.

modules.name: array-utils
modules.description: A set of functions for performing common array operations.

functions.name: chunk
functions.description: Splits an array into chunks of a specified size.

functions.name: unique
functions.description: Removes duplicate values from an array.

functions.name: groupBy
functions.description: Groups the elements of an array based on a given key.

functions.name: flatten
functions.description: Flattens a nested array into a single-level array.

functions.name: shuffle
functions.description: Randomly shuffles the elements of an array.

functions.name: compact
functions.description: Removes all falsy values (false, null, 0, "", undefined, NaN) from an array.

modules.name: object-utils
modules.description: A collection of helper functions for common object manipulations.

functions.name: get
functions.description: Safely gets a nested property from an object using a string path.

functions.name: pick
functions.description: Creates a new object with only the specified keys from the original object.

functions.name: omit
functions.description: Creates a new object without the specified keys from the original object.

functions.name: isEqual
functions.description: Performs a deep comparison between two objects to determine if they are equivalent.

functions.name: cloneDeep
functions.description: Creates a deep clone of a JSON-serializable object.

modules.name: logger
modules.description: A configurable logger with multiple levels and transport outputs.

functions.name: Logger.getInstance
functions.description: Gets the singleton instance of the Logger.

functions.name: logger.setConfig
functions.description: Updates the logger's configuration (e.g., minimum level).

functions.name: logger.addTransport
functions.description: Adds a new output transport for log messages.

functions.name: logger.debug
functions.description: Logs a message at the DEBUG level.

functions.name: logger.info
functions.description: Logs a message at the INFO level.

functions.name: logger.warn
functions.description: Logs a message at the WARN level.

functions.name: logger.error
functions.description: Logs a message at the ERROR level.

description: Modules to simplify interactions with external APIs.

modules.name: gemini-service
modules.description: A wrapper for the Gemini API to streamline content generation.

functions.name: generateText
functions.description: Generates text content from a given prompt using Gemini, with an optional system instruction.

functions.name: generateTextFromImage
functions.description: Generates text content from a prompt and an image.
params: image: { inlineData: { data: string, mimeType: string } }

description: Modules leveraging generative AI for advanced functionalities.

modules.name: gemini-chat
modules.description: A wrapper for the Gemini API to create interactive chat sessions.

functions.name: createChat
functions.description: Creates a new chat session instance.

modules.name: image-editor
modules.description: Leverage Gemini to edit images with text prompts.

functions.name: editImage
functions.description: Edits an image based on a text prompt using the Gemini image editing model.

description: Functions for simplifying common DOM manipulations and interactions.

modules.name: dom-utils
modules.description: A collection of helper functions for common DOM manipulations like event handling and class toggling.

functions.name: on
functions.description: Attaches an event listener to an element.

functions.name: off
functions.description: Removes an event listener from an element.

functions.name: toggleClass
functions.description: Toggles a CSS class on an element.

functions.name: delegate
functions.description: Attaches a delegated event listener to a parent element. Returns a function to remove the listener.

functions.name: qs
functions.description: A shorthand for document.querySelector.

functions.name: qsa
functions.description: A shorthand for document.querySelectorAll.

functions.name: setStyle
functions.description: Sets multiple CSS properties on an element at once.

description: Implementations of common data structures like Queues, Stacks, and Trees.

modules.name: queue
modules.description: A generic Queue class implementing the First-In, First-Out (FIFO) principle.

functions.name: enqueue
functions.description: Adds an item to the end of the queue.

functions.name: dequeue
functions.description: Removes and returns the item from the front of the queue.

functions.name: peek
functions.description: Returns the item at the front of the queue without removing it.

functions.name: isEmpty
functions.description: Checks if the queue is empty.

functions.name: size
functions.description: Gets the current number of items in the queue (getter).

functions.name: clear
functions.description: Clears all items from the queue.

functions.name: getItems
functions.description: Returns a copy of the queue's items as an array.

modules.name: stack
modules.description: A generic Stack class implementing the Last-In, First-Out (LIFO) principle.

functions.name: push
functions.description: Adds an item to the top of the stack.

functions.name: pop
functions.description: Removes and returns the item from the top of the stack.

functions.name: peek
functions.description: Returns the item at the top of the stack without removing it.

functions.name: isEmpty
functions.description: Checks if the stack is empty.

functions.name: size
functions.description: Gets the current number of items in the stack (getter).

functions.name: clear
functions.description: Clears all items from the stack.

functions.name: getItems
functions.description: Returns a copy of the stack's items as an array.

modules.name: linked-list
modules.description: A generic doubly-linked list class with standard list operations.

functions.name: append
functions.description: Adds a new node with the given value to the end of the list.

functions.name: prepend
functions.description: Adds a new node with the given value to the start of the list.

functions.name: delete
functions.description: Removes the first node with the specified value from the list.

functions.name: find
functions.description: Finds the first node containing the specified value.

functions.name: toArray
functions.description: Returns an array representation of the list.

functions.name: size
functions.description: Gets the current number of nodes in the list (getter).

functions.name: isEmpty
functions.description: Checks if the list is empty.

description: Implementations of classic algorithms for sorting, searching, and more.

modules.name: sorting-utils
modules.description: A collection of classic sorting algorithms with generators for visualization.

functions.name: bubbleSort
functions.description: A generator that yields each step of the Bubble Sort algorithm.

functions.name: selectionSort
functions.description: A generator that yields each step of the Selection Sort algorithm.

functions.name: quickSort
functions.description: A generator that yields each step of the Quick Sort algorithm.

functions.name: insertionSort
functions.description: A generator that yields each step of the Insertion Sort algorithm.

modules.name: a-star-pathfinding
modules.description: An implementation of the A* search algorithm to find the shortest path on a grid.

functions.name: findPathAStar
functions.description: A generator that yields each step of the A* algorithm.

description: A collection of utilities for formatting, parsing, and manipulating dates and times.

modules.name: date-utils
modules.description: A collection of utilities for formatting, parsing, and manipulating dates and times.

functions.name: formatDate
functions.description: Formats a Date object into a readable string. Tokens: YYYY, MM, DD, HH (24hr), hh (12hr), mm, ss, a/A (am/pm).

functions.name: timeAgo
functions.description: Returns a human-readable string representing how long ago a date was (e.g., '5 minutes ago').

functions.name: isToday
functions.description: Checks if a given date is the same day as today.

functions.name: addDays
functions.description: Adds a specified number of days to a given date.

functions.name: addHours
functions.description: Adds a specified number of hours to a given date.

functions.name: isFuture
functions.description: Checks if a given date is in the future.

functions.name: isLeapYear
functions.description: Checks if a given year is a leap year.

functions.name: formatDuration
functions.description: Formats a duration in seconds into a HH:MM:SS string.

functions.name: startOfDay
functions.description: Returns a new Date object set to the start of the day (00:00:00).

functions.name: endOfDay
functions.description: Returns a new Date object set to the end of the day (23:59:59).

description: Helper functions for advanced mathematical operations, number formatting, and statistics.

modules.name: math-utils
modules.description: A set of functions for common mathematical operations and number formatting.

functions.name: clamp
functions.description: Clamps a number within the inclusive lower and upper bounds.

functions.name: lerp
functions.description: Linearly interpolates between two numbers.

functions.name: randomRange
functions.description: Returns a random integer within a specified range (inclusive).

functions.name: formatCurrency
functions.description: Formats a number as a currency string for a given locale.

functions.name: mapRange
functions.description: Maps a number from one range to another.

functions.name: average
functions.description: Calculates the average of numbers in an array.

description: A suite of functions for validating data formats like emails, URLs, and passwords.

modules.name: validation-utils
modules.description: A suite of functions for validating common data formats.

functions.name: isEmail
functions.description: Checks if a string is a valid email address.

functions.name: isURL
functions.description: Checks if a string is a valid URL.

functions.name: isStrongPassword
functions.description: Checks if a password meets specified strength criteria (length, cases, numbers, symbols).

functions.name: isJSON
functions.description: Checks if a string is a valid JSON.

functions.name: isNumeric
functions.description: Checks if a string contains only numeric characters.

functions.name: isHexColor
functions.description: Checks if a string is a valid 3 or 6-digit hex color code.

description: Utilities for managing asynchronous operations, such as debounce, throttle, and retry.

modules.name: async-utils
modules.description: Utilities for managing asynchronous operations like debounce, throttle, and retry.

functions.name: debounce
functions.description: Creates a debounced function that delays invoking func until after wait milliseconds have elapsed.

functions.name: throttle
functions.description: Creates a throttled function that only invokes func at most once per every wait milliseconds.

functions.name: retry
functions.description: Attempts to execute an async function, retrying a specified number of times on failure.

functions.name: sleep
functions.description: Pauses execution for a specified number of milliseconds.

functions.name: timeout
functions.description: Rejects a promise if it doesn't resolve within a given time.

description: Wrappers and helpers for browser APIs like LocalStorage, SessionStorage, and Fetch.

modules.name: storage-utils
modules.description: Safe and convenient wrappers for localStorage and sessionStorage that handle JSON serialization and optional item expiration.

functions.name: localStore.set
functions.description: Sets a value in localStorage after JSON stringifying it. Can optionally set an expiration time.

functions.name: localStore.get
functions.description: Gets and parses a JSON value from localStorage. Returns null if expired.

functions.name: localStore.remove
functions.description: Removes an item from localStorage.

functions.name: localStore.clear
functions.description: Clears all items from localStorage.

functions.name: sessionStore.set
functions.description: Sets a value in sessionStorage after JSON stringifying it. Can optionally set an expiration time.

functions.name: sessionStore.get
functions.description: Gets and parses a JSON value from sessionStorage. Returns null if expired.

functions.name: sessionStore.remove
functions.description: Removes an item from sessionStorage.

functions.name: sessionStore.clear
functions.description: Clears all items from sessionStorage.

modules.name: cookie-utils
modules.description: A set of helper functions for getting, setting, and deleting browser cookies.

functions.name: setCookie
functions.description: Sets a browser cookie with a name, value, and optional settings.

functions.name: getCookie
functions.description: Gets a cookie's value by its name.

functions.name: deleteCookie
functions.description: Deletes a cookie by its name.

modules.name: indexed-db-utils
modules.description: A promise-based wrapper for IndexedDB to simplify database operations.

functions.name: new DBManager(dbName, version)
functions.description: Creates a new database manager instance.

functions.name: db.open(schema)
functions.description: Opens the database and creates/updates object stores based on the schema.

functions.name: db.add(storeName, data)
functions.description: Adds a record to the specified object store.

functions.name: db.update(storeName, data)
functions.description: Updates a record in the store (or adds it if it doesn't exist).

functions.name: db.get(storeName, key)
functions.description: Retrieves a record by its key.

functions.name: db.getAll(storeName)
functions.description: Retrieves all records from a store.

functions.name: db.delete(storeName, key)
functions.description: Deletes a record by its key.

functions.name: db.clear(storeName)
functions.description: Deletes all records from a store.

functions.name: db.close()
functions.description: Closes the database connection.

description: Utilities for client-side file reading, downloading, and manipulation.

modules.name: file-utils
modules.description: A collection of helpers for handling files in the browser.

functions.name: readFileAsText
functions.description: Reads a File object and returns its content as a string.

functions.name: readFileAsDataURL
functions.description: Reads a File object and returns its content as a Base64 Data URL.

functions.name: readFileAsArrayBuffer
functions.description: Reads a File object and returns its content as an ArrayBuffer for binary data.

functions.name: downloadFile
functions.description: Triggers a browser download for the given content.

functions.name: formatBytes
functions.description: Formats a size in bytes to a human-readable string (KB, MB, GB).

functions.name: getFileExtension
functions.description: Extracts the file extension from a filename.

functions.name: getImageDimensions
functions.description: Gets the width and height of an image file or Data URL.

functions.name: resizeImage
functions.description: Resizes an image on the client-side while maintaining aspect ratio.

description: Tools and utilities for drawing shapes, handling animations, and managing state on an HTML5 canvas.

modules.name: canvas-utils
modules.description: A set of helper functions for working with the HTML5 Canvas API, simplifying drawing and context management.

functions.name: getContext
functions.description: Safely gets the 2D rendering context from a canvas element.

functions.name: clearCanvas
functions.description: Clears the entire canvas.

functions.name: drawCircle
functions.description: Draws a circle on the canvas.

functions.name: drawRect
functions.description: Draws a rectangle on the canvas.

functions.name: drawRoundedRect
functions.description: Draws a rectangle with rounded corners on the canvas.

functions.name: drawLine
functions.description: Draws a line on the canvas.

functions.name: drawText
functions.description: Draws text on the canvas.

functions.name: drawPolygon
functions.description: Draws a polygon on the canvas from an array of points.

functions.name: drawImage
functions.description: Draws an image, supporting scaling, rotation, and cropping.

functions.name: drawVector
functions.description: Draws a vector on the canvas from the origin of the current context.

modules.name: color-utils
modules.description: A collection of helper functions for color conversions and manipulations.

functions.name: hexToRgb
functions.description: Converts a HEX color string to an RGB object.

functions.name: rgbToHex
functions.description: Converts RGB color components to a HEX color string.

functions.name: rgbToHsl
functions.description: Converts an RGB color value to HSL.

functions.name: hslToRgb
functions.description: Converts an HSL color value to RGB.

functions.name: lightenDarkenColor
functions.description: Lightens or darkens a HEX color by a given percentage.

functions.name: rgba
functions.description: Converts a HEX color to an RGBA string with a specified alpha value.

functions.name: interpolateColors
functions.description: Interpolates between two HEX colors.

modules.name: vector-utils
modules.description: A collection of functions for 2D vector math.

functions.name: createVector
functions.description: Creates a new vector object.

functions.name: add
functions.description: Adds two vectors.

functions.name: subtract
functions.description: Subtracts the second vector from the first.

functions.name: multiply
functions.description: Multiplies a vector by a scalar value.

functions.name: divide
functions.description: Divides a vector by a scalar value.

functions.name: magnitude
functions.description: Calculates the magnitude (length) of a vector.

functions.name: normalize
functions.description: Normalizes a vector to a unit length of 1.

functions.name: dot
functions.description: Calculates the dot product of two vectors.

functions.name: distance
functions.description: Calculates the Euclidean distance between two vectors.

functions.name: rotate
functions.description: Rotates a vector by a given angle in radians.

functions.name: lerp
functions.description: Linearly interpolates between two vectors.

functions.name: limit
functions.description: Constrains a vector's magnitude to a maximum value.

modules.name: animation-loop
modules.description: A utility for creating a clean animation loop with delta time.

functions.name: createAnimationLoop
functions.description: Creates and manages a clean animation loop using requestAnimationFrame.

modules.name: collision-utils
modules.description: Functions for detecting collisions between various 2D shapes.

functions.name: pointInRect
functions.description: Checks if a point is inside a rectangle.

functions.name: pointInCircle
functions.description: Checks if a point is inside a circle.

functions.name: rectToRect
functions.description: Checks for collision between two rectangles.

functions.name: circleToCircle
functions.description: Checks for collision between two circles.

functions.name: rectToCircle
functions.description: Checks for collision between a rectangle and a circle.

functions.name: pointInPolygon
functions.description: Checks if a point is inside a polygon.

functions.name: polygonToPolygon
functions.description: Checks for collision between two convex polygons.

functions.name: polygonToRect
functions.description: Checks for collision between a polygon and a rectangle.

functions.name: polygonToCircle
functions.description: Checks for collision between a polygon and a circle.

modules.name: particle-system
modules.description: A simple emitter and particle system for creating effects.

functions.name: createEmitter
functions.description: Creates a new ParticleEmitter instance.

functions.name: emitter.emit(count)
functions.description: Emits a number of particles from the emitter's position.

functions.name: emitter.update(deltaTime)
functions.description: Updates the state of all particles.

functions.name: emitter.draw(ctx)
functions.description: Draws all particles to the canvas.

functions.name: emitter.setPosition(x, y)
functions.description: Moves the emitter to a new position.

modules.name: canvas-effects
modules.description: A collection of functions for applying pixel-based effects to a canvas.

functions.name: applyEffect
functions.description: Applies a given effect function to the canvas.

functions.name: grayscale
functions.description: Converts the canvas image to grayscale.

functions.name: sepia
functions.description: Applies a sepia tone effect.

functions.name: invert
functions.description: Inverts the colors of the image.

functions.name: brightness
functions.description: Adjusts the brightness.

functions.name: contrast
functions.description: Adjusts the contrast.

functions.name: pixelate
functions.description: Applies a pixelation effect.

functions.name: blur
functions.description: Applies a box blur effect.

functions.name: sharpen
functions.description: Applies a sharpening effect.

functions.name: edgeDetection
functions.description: Applies an edge detection effect.

modules.name: canvas-layer-manager
modules.description: A manager for handling multiple stacked canvas elements.

functions.name: new LayerManager(container)
functions.description: Creates a new manager instance.

functions.name: manager.createLayer(name)
functions.description: Creates a new canvas layer.

functions.name: manager.getLayer(name)
functions.description: Retrieves a layer by its name.

functions.name: manager.reorderLayers(names)
functions.description: Reorders layers based on an array of names.

functions.name: layer.clear()
functions.description: Clears a specific layer.

functions.name: layer.setVisibility(visible)
functions.description: Shows or hides a layer.

functions.name: layer.setOpacity(opacity)
functions.description: Sets a layer's opacity.

modules.name: noise-utils
modules.description: An implementation of the Perlin Noise algorithm for generating procedural textures and patterns.

functions.name: new PerlinNoise(seed)
functions.description: Creates a new Perlin noise generator.

functions.name: noise.get(x, y)
functions.description: Gets the 2D Perlin noise value for a coordinate.

modules.name: attractor-utils
modules.description: Functions for generating strange attractors like the Clifford attractor.

functions.name: generateCliffordPoints
functions.description: A generator that calculates points for a Clifford Attractor.

modules.name: l-system
modules.description: A utility for generating and interpreting Lindenmayer Systems (L-Systems) to create fractals.

functions.name: generateLSystemString
functions.description: Generates the final instruction string for an L-System.

functions.name: interpretLSystem
functions.description: A generator that interprets an L-System string and yields drawing commands.

modules.name: reaction-diffusion
modules.description: A system for simulating Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion patterns.

functions.name: createReactionDiffusion
functions.description: Creates a new reaction-diffusion simulation system.

functions.name: system.seed(x, y, radius)
functions.description: Adds a concentration of chemical B to an area.

functions.name: system.update()
functions.description: Performs one iteration of the simulation step.

functions.name: system.getGrid(chemical)
functions.description: Returns the specified chemical grid for rendering.

modules.name: svg-utils
modules.description: A collection of helpers for parsing, manipulating, and creating SVG elements programmatically.

functions.name: parseSVG
functions.description: Parses an SVG string into an SVGSVGElement.

functions.name: serializeSVG
functions.description: Serializes an SVGSVGElement back into a string.

functions.name: applyAttributes
functions.description: Applies a set of attributes to an SVG element.

functions.name: shapeToPath
functions.description: Converts basic SVG shapes to an equivalent <path> element.

functions.name: convertAllShapesToPaths
functions.description: Traverses an SVG and converts all basic shapes to paths.

functions.name: renderComponent
functions.description: Renders a component function into an SVG element.

modules.name: simple-store
modules.description: A simple pub/sub store for centralized state management.

functions.name: createStore
functions.description: Creates a store object with getState, setState, subscribe, and reset methods.

description: Custom React hooks for common patterns and browser API interactions.

modules.name: useEventListener
modules.description: A React hook that simplifies adding and removing event listeners.

functions.name: useEventListener
functions.description: Attaches an event listener to an element or window, with automatic cleanup.

modules.name: useCopyToClipboard
modules.description: A hook that provides a function to copy text to the clipboard.

functions.name: useCopyToClipboard
functions.description: Returns the last copied text and a function to copy new text.

modules.name: useDebounce
modules.description: A hook that debounces a value, useful for delaying expensive operations.

functions.name: useDebounce
functions.description: Debounces a value.

modules.name: useLocalStorage
modules.description: A hook that syncs state to localStorage with a useState-like interface.

functions.name: useLocalStorage
functions.description: Syncs state to localStorage.

modules.name: useToggle
modules.description: A simple hook for managing boolean state.

functions.name: useToggle
functions.description: Returns the current state and a function to toggle it.
